# komodo_repo (Data Source)

Reads an existing Komodo git repository.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_repo" "example" {
  name = "my-repo"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The git repository identifier (ObjectId). One of `name` or `id` must be set.
- `name` (String) The name of the git repository. One of `name` or `id` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `builder_id` (String) The ID of the attached builder.
- `environment` (Attributes) Environment configuration for the repository. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--environment))
- `links` (List of String) Quick links associated with this repository.
- `on_clone` (Attributes) The command run after the repository is cloned. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--on_clone))
- `on_pull` (Attributes) The command run after the repository is pulled. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--on_pull))
- `path` (String) The folder on the server the repo is cloned into.
- `server_id` (String) The ID of the server the repo is cloned on.
- `source` (Attributes) Git provider configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--source))
- `webhook` (Attributes) Webhook configuration and URLs for the repository. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--webhook))

<a id="nestedatt--environment"></a>
### Nested Schema for `environment`

Read-Only:

- `file_path` (String) Path to the environment file.
- `variables` (Map of String) Environment variables injected. Keys are uppercased.


<a id="nestedatt--on_clone"></a>
### Nested Schema for `on_clone`

Read-Only:

- `command` (String) The shell command to run.
- `path` (String) The working directory for the command.


<a id="nestedatt--on_pull"></a>
### Nested Schema for `on_pull`

Read-Only:

- `command` (String) The shell command to run.
- `path` (String) The working directory for the command.


<a id="nestedatt--source"></a>
### Nested Schema for `source`

Read-Only:

- `account_id` (String) The git account used for private repositories.
- `branch` (String) The branch checked out.
- `commit` (String) The specific commit hash checked out.
- `domain` (String) The git provider domain without protocol prefix (e.g. `github.com`).
- `https_enabled` (Boolean) Whether HTTPS is used for cloning.
- `path` (String) The repository path, e.g. `owner/repo`.


<a id="nestedatt--webhook"></a>
### Nested Schema for `webhook`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether webhooks trigger an action on this repository.
- `secret` (String) The alternate webhook secret.
- `url_build` (String) Webhook URL to trigger a build.
- `url_clone` (String) Webhook URL to trigger a git clone.
- `url_pull` (String) Webhook URL to trigger a git pull.
